revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: [[Category:Pages with blank templates]] <noinclude> [[Category:Blank templates]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Reverted 1 edit by [[Special:Contributions/154.154.69.110|154.154.69.110]] ([[User talk:154.154.69.110|talk]]) to last revision by Mr. Stradivarius
1 revision imported: more imports
1 revision imported: importing programmatically made stuff
1 revision imported: importing all the coordinates module stuff with the timestamps removed in order to force updates
Text replacement - "ategory" to "ategory:qq]][[sn:"
Text replacement - "qq" to "11"
Text replacement - "[[Category:11]]" to ""
1 revision imported: importing the coordinates
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
update icon copy
1 revision imported: overwriting
Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23631271398|commit triggered pipeline]]
Text replacement - "</noinclude>↵<noinclude>" to ""
update icon copy
1 revision imported: overwriting to try to fix the lower alpha issue
update icon copy
1 revision imported: overwriting to try to fix the lower alpha issue
update icon copy
1 revision imported: overwriting to try to fix the lower alpha issue
Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24984760715|time triggered pipeline]]
